working_on.task: Finalizing project docs and OTA setup guide
working_on.notes: All v1.3 features (9 items) are verified and documented.

recent_changes.description: Fixed click-through drag handle sizing (px to dp) and interaction logic.
Added manual check update button and OTA setup documentation.

decisions_made.decision: Use 48dp Window bounds with 12dp visual dot for click-through handle
decisions_made.reason: Provides adequate touch target while remaining visually subtle.
Prevents accidental movement when interacting with apps behind the widget.
Free, reliable, and requires no custom server backend.

pending_tasks.task: Integrate real GitHub RAW URL in OtaUpdateManager.kt once repo is created
